title: BetterAnimated
description: This texture pack improves furnace and smoker animations,and adds a little extra to your game!
body:

# EVERY 30% OF THE REVENUE GOES TO CHARITY.


# News:

Looks like Better Animated has come back...Just wait for the 0.25

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
# Changelog

**1. Compatibility with 26.1**

**2. New numbering system**

**3. New changelog system (including desc changelog too)**

**4. New branding incoming!**


▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

## Currently Compatible with:

* 🧑🏻‍🌾 Fresh Animations

* ☀️ Reshaded (Made by DR7)
  
* 🟩 Al's Crepper Revamped

* 🧪 Every Optimization mod


## Probably NOT compatible:

* 💥 Explosive Enhancement

* 💥 Explosive Party (Colored Explosions/TNT) //Only adds Colored Explosions.

* 💥 Explosions Overhaul //I Don't know if it changes the textures,if not,use the texture pack Thanks!

* I’m planning to expand the pack with more animated blocks and items 🎉. Every download helps speed up future updates ⏩.
